title: Fuel Finder: privacy notice
body: "Fuel Finder is a government service that helps drivers find the cheapest fuel near them. It makes fuel prices available to third party apps and websites so motorists can compare prices easily.  This notice sets out how we will collect, use, store and protect your personal data when you report your fuel prices and forecourt details.  It is made under Articles 13 and/or 14 of the UK General Data Protection Regulation (UK GDPR).  "
